step_rationale: Cholesterol homeostasis and vascular endothelial function regulator; affects lipid metabolic pathways.
mechanism: TMTC2 modulates intracellular cholesterol trafficking and endothelial barrier integrity, influencing lipid retention and vascular dysfunction.

references.title: Genome- and transcriptome-wide association meta-analysis reveals new insights into genes affecting coronary and peripheral artery disease.
